description:
Document in Arabic script. Dating: likely ca. 13th century Ayyubid. An official account of some sort, probably related to state produce, "مما يتحصل من الغلات الديواني". Mentions al-Dīwān al-ʿĀlī al-Mawlawī followed by a string of titles (like al-malikī al-Nāṣirī...). Needs examination.

Reused on verso for accounts in Judaeo-Arabic and Greek/Coptic numerals.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
